title: Do Things That Don't Scale
html:
Stub. The Paul Graham–originated startup heuristic Yahir reaches for whenever a product needs cold-start traction. First documented invocation: the Jan 2024 WagerWrld memo — "go out to local events and offer the app for the specific event, and create odds within it." Recurs in the Nov 2025 Get a Grip planning doc as "truly hacky SHIT IRL this may be the meta" for Brotein marketing.

Source summaries

  • 2019 08 15 voice memo 1852 — VC founder's coffee-knock anecdote (speaker; example of the do-things-that-dont-scale pattern, not Yahir's articulation). Yahir's own articulation traces to Paul Graham (cited 2024+, with the earliest extant Paul Graham reference appearing in the Dec 2023 Vision for Big Life doc).
